source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/10. 설계변경 문서/(A-TCF-5-019-A-038) 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件_2024.08.30/설계변경 문서/첨부문서/A1417MCW_BOM(UBCARE).xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM listing for A1417MCW / 2G 1417 detector assemblies, deco sheet, packing, and accessory set.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design history or device master record traceability for product structure, parts, materials, quantities, packing, and accessories.
keyPoints: Top-level item is 1417_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET with product number MSH-100010 and specification 2G&3G_1417_DECO_SHEET.
A1417MCW_ASSY includes A1417MCW-MT process, detector panel, PBA assemblies, rear cover assembly, middle block assembly, front carbon, hardware, cables, network module, and shock logging module.
Material entries include Cesium Iodide, Thallium Iodide, UV resin sealant, conductive tapes, adhesives, shields, and cushions.
Accessory set ACCSET-MCW(2G) includes power cords, LAN cables, battery, power box, ferrite core, recharger adaptor, charger, and AC1200 Archer C64 Wi-Fi router.

entities.name: Thallium Iodide
entities.evidence: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

concepts.name: Detector scintillator materials
concepts.evidence: Cesium Iodide M20R1-001 CsI (99.999%) / CsI (99.99%) / CsI Recycle (99.99%) KG 1.5

evidence.claim: The document is a BOM output.
The top-level deco sheet item is 1417_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET, product number MSH-100010, specified as 2G&3G_1417_DECO_SHEET.
A1417MCW_ASSY is listed as a 2G_A1417MCW assembly with quantity 1.
The detector panel assembly includes a 440 x 520 x 0.7 panel, CsI 500 micrometer, and Al Sheet.
Cesium Iodide is included as CsI with listed purities of 99.999%, 99.99%, and recycled 99.99%, quantity 1.5 kg.
Thallium Iodide is included as beads with listed purity 99.999%, quantity 10 g.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

evidence.claim: The rear cover assembly is 2G_1417_REAR_COVER_ASSY and is specified as non-battery-cover.
The accessory set includes a harness signal item referencing IEC60332-1.
The accessory set includes BATTERY-2G DETECTOR, product number MI43-01011A, specified as ELT-3S1PA Li-ion Pol, quantity 2.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-04 BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A ELT-3S1PA,Li-ion Pol EA 2

evidence.claim: The accessory set includes CHARGER-2G, product number MI44-01041A-D.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-09 CHARGER-2G MI44-01041A-D CHARGER-2G DETECTOR CHARGER;MSP-90W-12VC EA 1

evidence.claim: The accessory set includes AC1200 Archer C64 Wi-Fi router.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-11 AC1200 Archer C64 Wi-Fi 공유기 PAC-000001 AP_ROUTER_ANY EA 1
